3050370.name: RPG Maker MV - 【Rdot】monsters vol.3
3050370.description:
The graphic asset features an all-familiar pop aesthetic for all its characters.
This set is a derivative work of ISEKAI CREATOARS, but can be used in any other works!

Contents
1) Enemy assets: 120
Includes 10 types of enemies with 4 color variations and 3 sizes each – EX/Big/Small.
(2) Face assets (static faces - no changes in facial expression) - 5 sheets
(3) 24x32 standard walking graphics (2x sized graphics included) - 5 sheets

-----------------------------------------------------------------------

【Enemy assets】

・Mage：Roulier
・Cleric：Terence
・Void Walker：Misora
・Void Walker：Kotarou
・Guild Branch Master：Gilbert
・Fighter：Alan
・Thief：Megu
・Blacksmith Shop Clerk：Hana
・Guild Receptionist：Jewel
・Nomad Merchant："Rainy day"

-----------------------------------------------------------------------

・This pack is for use in RPG Maker Series or the engine of your choice.
・OK to be used in Commercial projects made in RPG Maker
・You may modify some of the assets (but not redistribute them) for your own game use only.
